title: urvillea triphylla
intro: Urvillea triphylla, also known as the 'Three-leafed Urvillea', is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a shrub with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Urvillea triphylla include alleviating symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as soothing digestive issues such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers. Urvillea triphylla is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, with the dried leaves being used for herbal remedies, or as a tincture in traditional medicine.
